mapper.sql: SELECT PR.ID, PR.BOOK_SALE_RECORD_ID, PR.CUSTOMER_ID, PR.BOOK_OWNER_ID, PR.RATING, PR.CONTENT, PR.CREATED_AT, PR.UPDATED_AT, CU.NAME AS CUSTOMER_NAME, B.BOOK_NAME AS BOOK_NAME, OU.NAME AS BOOK_OWNER_NAME FROM PURCHASE_REVIEW PR JOIN USERS CU ON PR.CUSTOMER_ID = CU.ID JOIN BOOK_SALE_RECORD BSR ON PR.BOOK_SALE_RECORD_ID = BSR.ID JOIN BOOK B ON BSR.ID = B.ID JOIN USERS OU ON PR.BOOK_OWNER_ID = OU.ID
mapper.insert:
SELECT "ISEQ$$_79421".CURRVAL FROM DUAL
INSERT INTO PURCHASE_REVIEW (BOOK_SALE_RECORD_ID, CUSTOMER_ID, BOOK_OWNER_ID, RATING, CONTENT) VALUES (#{bookSaleRecordId}, #{customerId}, #{bookOwnerId}, #{rating}, #{content,jdbcType=VARCHAR})
mapper.select: WHERE PR.CUSTOMER_ID = #{customerId} ORDER BY PR.CREATED_AT DESC
WHERE PR.BOOK_OWNER_ID = #{bookOwnerId} ORDER BY PR.CREATED_AT DESC
SELECT NVL(ROUND(AVG(RATING), 1), 0) AS AVERAGE_RATING, COUNT(*) AS REVIEW_COUNT FROM PURCHASE_REVIEW WHERE BOOK_OWNER_ID = #{bookOwnerId}
